app_metadata.description: A modern game server management panel built in Rust. Deploy, monitor, and manage Minecraft, Hytale, and other game servers with industry-leading performance.
app_metadata.name: calagopus

run_as_context.description: Container [calagopus] runs as root user and group.
Container [postgres] runs as non-root user and group.
Container [redis] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: Calagopus

attrs.label: Postgres Image (CAUTION)
attrs.description:
If you are changing this after the postgres directory has been initialized,</br>
STOP! and make sure you have a backup of your data.</br>
Changing this will trigger an one way database upgrade.</br>
You can only select newer versions of postgres.</br>
Selecting an older version will refuse to start.</br>
If something goes wrong, you will have to restore from backup.

enum.description: Postgres 18

attrs.label: Database Password
attrs.description: The password for Calagopus.

attrs.label: Image Type
attrs.description:
Choose the Docker image variant for Calagopus.</br>
AIO - All-In-One
AIO Heavy - All-In-One with extra tools for various extensions

enum.description: AIO
AIO Heavy

attrs.label: App Encryption Key
attrs.description:
Encryption key used to secure sensitive data within the Panel (such as access tokens).</br>
This must be a long, random string and once set should NOT be changed - changing it will</br>
invalidate any previously encrypted data.</br>
For best security use 32 or more random characters.

attrs.label: Trusted Proxies
attrs.description:
List of trusted proxy IP addresses or CIDR ranges allowed to forward requests to the Panel.</br>
Required when running behind a reverse proxy or load balancer so the correct client IP is used.

attrs.label: Server Name
attrs.description: A label for this Panel (and Wings) instance.

attrs.label: Additional Environment Variables
attrs.description: Configure custom environment variables for advanced configuration not exposed above.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: SFTP Port
attrs.description: Port used by Wings to provide SFTP access to game server files.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode

- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.label: Automatic Permissions
attrs.description:
Automatically set permissions for the host path.
Enabling this, will check the top level directory,</br>
If it finds incorrect permissions, it will `chown` the
host path to the user and group required for the
postgres container.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)

1.0.8.readme:
Calagopus

Calagopus is a modern, open-source game server management panel built with Rust and React. It provides a fast, secure interface for deploying, monitoring, and maintaining game servers - built for everyone from solo homelabbers to large hosting operators.

It draws inspiration from Pterodactyl but is written from scratch in Rust, with a focus on performance, security, and extensibility. The panel includes a rich extension API and welcomes community contributions.

capabilities.description: Calagopus is able to change group ID of processes
capabilities.name: SETGID

capabilities.description: Calagopus is able to transfer capabilities between processes
capabilities.name: SETPCAP

capabilities.description: Calagopus is able to change user ID of processes
capabilities.name: SETUID
